name: Installment Agreement Penalty Reduction

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must be an individual who filed their return on or before the due date (including extensions) and has a valid section 6159 installment agreement in place.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reduces the failure-to-pay penalty rate from 0.5% to 0.25% per month for individuals during the period an installment agreement is in effect.
